title: WebSocketEnvelope
description: The framing envelope used by the WebSocket message transport.

channel.description: The logical channel (topic/routing key) for this message.

type.description: The envelope type: publish, subscribe, unsubscribe, or dead-letter.

originalChannel.description: The original channel when this is a dead-letter envelope.

error.description: Error message when this is a dead-letter envelope.

errorType.description: Fully-qualified error type name when this is a dead-letter envelope.
